creator: frederic@culot.org
text:
I just opened the following PR to update p5-Devel-StackTrace to 1.24:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/150267

I did not see this PR before sending mine, I am very sorry for that.
As stated by pav@, a new class was introduced with version 1.24, which is
handled by my patch.

Frederic
